variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 128 Breather Filter | Replaces the Parker SAB1562-40
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 128 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the Parker SAB1562-40. Easy to install and replace, the FS 128 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
